name: PT Integra Indocabinet Tbk
summary: PT Integra Indocabinet Tbk manufactures and sells wooden furniture and other wooden products in Indonesia. The company operates through Manufacturing, Forestry, and Trading segments. It offers indoor, reclaim wood, panel, set up, garden/outdoor, and industrial and natural fiber furniture; building components, door products, and solid and fingerjoint laminated boards; and furniture for hotel, apartment, and school projects. The company also holds forest concession rights. It exports its products to the United States, Asia, Australia, Africa, and Europe. The company was founded in 1989 and is based in Sidoarjo, Indonesia. PT Integra Indocabinet Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Integra Indo Lestari.
